heading: Run Autocomplete and Partial Match Queries
body:
You can use MongoDB Search to run autocomplete and partial queries
that return results for partial words. This is useful to retrieve
results with increasing accuracy as more characters
are entered in your application's search field. You must
index the fields as the MongoDB Search [tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete) type to use the [autocomplete](autocomplete-ref)
operator.

To get started, see [How to Run Autocomplete and Partial Match MongoDB Search Queries](partial-match-tutorial).
